_note: Non-canon roster only (canon/book characters excluded per owner — real refs exist). Prompts derived from BANNON_ROSTER entries (build, shape, palette, style). Feed to hunyuan3d_batch_generator; each result auto-binds as that character's DEFAULT attire, 3js kept as alternate.
style_suffix: full-body pro-wrestling / MMA fighter, T-pose, athletic anatomy, game-ready, clean topology, PBR skin and fabric, neutral studio lighting, symmetrical, single character, no background

characters.name: Titan
characters.prompt: A towering heavyweight powerhouse pro-wrestler, massively muscular with huge chest, broad shoulders and thick arms, tan-bronze skin, shaved black hair, intense red eyes, dark navy fight trunks with silver-grey trim and a metallic accent belt, black boots

characters.name: Viper
characters.prompt: A lean, long-limbed agile striker / kickboxer, wiry cut muscle, warm tan skin, sleek black hair, glowing green eyes, dark green fight trunks with neon-green trim and accents, minimal low-cut boots

characters.name: Golem
characters.prompt: A colossal super-heavyweight grappler, enormous stone-grey rugged skin, immense chest shoulders and forearms, huge hands, near-bald with black stubble, burning orange eyes, dark brown trunks with orange trim, heavy dark boots

characters.name: Ronin
characters.prompt: A disciplined balanced technical wrestler, samurai-inspired, athletic proportionate build, warm light skin, short dark topknot-style hair, dark crimson fight trunks with deep-red trim and a sash accent, dark low boots

characters.name: Zephyr
characters.prompt: An acrobatic capoeira fighter with a dancer's long powerful legs and lean upper body, dark brown skin, short black hair, bright blue eyes, deep blue-grey low trunks with sky-blue trim, barefoot or minimal wraps
